text.title: distributed-patterns Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for distributed-patterns as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Retrying non-idempotent write operations without verifying idempotency first.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Retrying a POST /orders without idempotency key creates duplicate orders. Either make the operation idempotent via idempotency key, or convert to PUT with a client-generated ID.
